挺符合我个人的口味，推荐喜欢这种类型小说的人看一下！
这本小说现在来看的话，都是挺不错的，后面的话就要看作者怎么写了，如果不拉胯的话，应该是一本很好的一本小说！
[吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697346448,"group_id":"7247380178387602466","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说！思想翱翔于天！夜晚，天空，望繁星入迷！（好书在旧）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcYqiM+SUCiPiJsihbDGlE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c03234a358f54533bb0717a9bd1d08bd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793614&x-signature=dr1luMtbcTyK70OVZpDcV46%2FbFM%3D","user_id":"109917622886","user_name":"皇一君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109917622886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774929499,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7247380178387602466","book_info":{"abstract":"楚墨穿越到僵尸世界，拜九叔为师学习道法。

九天玄女的奇门遁甲？学！
雷祖的神霄雷法很强？学！
能够收服妖魔的炼妖壶？要！
对了，在那之前，应该要先好好学习《丰都律》和《女青天律》。

:[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21495,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6307},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1697899287,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7349586791525712702","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很好，也很耐看，花了两天时间从头看到尾也没什么太大的毛病，主线剧情衔接的很好，特别是系统在结局从主角身上脱离的设定很新颖，给读者很大的幻想空间，这些都是优点，但缺点也很明显，作者大大在最后也提到了，但还是要接受批评，字数少，烂尾也有一点，结尾过渡跨度太大等等问题不可避免让读者不满，出戏，不过也希望作者再接再厉，写出更多更优秀的作品呈现给大家[笑][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711211562,"group_id":"7247380178387602466","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"南梁创飞世界⸜₍๑•⌔•๑₎⸝","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8XBNmKbM2AH91QA6qESAhvr66h0SfIZFn1tlCyF3H9i","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf15ff746cfe46f5b41040945dd81dd5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793834&x-signature=8ywQ9UuVupPVyT4XddUCnrjKBf8%3D","user_id":"2709617561305483","user_name":"问渠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2709617561305483","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1693007144,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7247380178387602466","book_info":{"abstract":"楚墨穿越到僵尸世界，拜九叔为师学习道法。
